  "claims": [

    {"id": "claim-6x", "claim_text": "Companies that draw on multiple types of interaction and feedback between humans and AI are six times more likely to amplify their success with AI.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Those companies that draw on multiple types of interaction and feedback between humans and AI are six times more likely to amplify their success with AI.", "location": "Introduction, p. 1"},

    {"id": "m-responsible", "text": "AT question for Responsible, Governable, and Contestable — Level 1: No responsible use governance process is in place for accountability and to ensure regulatory and widespread compliance of AI solution outcomes, including data bias indicators and the ability to contest findings.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No responsible use governance process is in place for accountability and to ensure regulatory and widespread compliance of  AI solution outcomes, including data bias indicators and the ability to contest findings.", "location": "Pillar 1, p. 7"},
    {"id": "m-transparency", "text": "AT question for Transparency — Level 1: No standardized approaches exist that enable clear traceability for AI outputs/outcomes.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No standardized approaches exist that enable clear traceability for AI outputs/outcomes enabling transparency and the ability to explain and justify results.", "location": "Pillar 1, p. 8"},
    {"id": "m-human-centric", "text": "AT question for Human-Centric, Fair, and Equitable — Level 1: No clear policies, standards, and approaches to ensure responsible use of AI.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No clear policies, standards, and approaches to ensure responsible use of AI through respect of human rights, diversity, well-being, fairness, and equitability.", "location": "Pillar 1, p. 9"},
    {"id": "m-strategic-plan", "text": "AT question for AI Strategic Plan — Level 1: No enterprise-based AI mission/vision statement, policies, standards, leadership roles, or budget are present.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No enterprise-based AI mission/vision statement, policies, standards, leadership roles, or budget are present.", "location": "Pillar 2, p. 10"},
    {"id": "m-partnerships", "text": "AT question for Partnerships — Level 1: No AI partnership(s) with industry, academia, or other agencies exist.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No AI partnership(s) with industry, academia, or other agencies exist.", "location": "Pillar 2, p. 11"},
    {"id": "m-governance", "text": "AT question for Governance — Level 1: No AI governance structure, audits, processes, and standards are in place.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No AI governance structure, audits, processes, and standards are in place.", "location": "Pillar 2, p. 12"},
    {"id": "m-culture", "text": "AT question for Culture — Level 1: The organizational entity has not absorbed norms that support widespread acceptance and use of AI.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "AI projects may exist, but the organizational entity has not absorbed norms that support widespread acceptance and use of AI.", "location": "Pillar 3, p. 13"},
    {"id": "m-org-structure", "text": "AT question for Organizational Structure — Level 1: The organizational entity does not have AI-specific structures, roles, and processes defined and documented.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "The organizational entity does not have AI-specific structures, roles, and processes defined and documented.", "location": "Pillar 3, p. 14"},
    {"id": "m-workforce", "text": "AT question for Workforce Development — Level 1: No solution or workforce plan is in place for AI workforce development.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No solution or workforce plan is in place for AI workforce development.", "location": "Pillar 3, p. 15"},
    {"id": "m-innovation", "text": "AT question for AI Innovation — Level 1: No defined approach is present to research, identify, and utilize AI-specific systems engineering.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No defined approach is present to research, identify, and utilize AI-specific systems engineering, and Human-Machine practices are applied in AI solutions.", "location": "Pillar 4, p. 16"},
    {"id": "m-test-eval", "text": "AT question for Test and Evaluation — Level 1: No guidelines and approaches for AI-specific test and evaluation (T&E) standards are in place.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No guidelines and approaches for AI-specific test and evaluation (T&E) standards are in place.", "location": "Pillar 4, p. 17"},
    {"id": "m-platforms", "text": "AT question for AI Platforms — Level 1: No AI-specific platform, processes, and tools are available.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No AI-specific platform, processes, and tools are available.", "location": "Pillar 4, p. 18"},
    {"id": "m-architecture", "text": "AT question for Data Architecture — Level 1: No common AI data architecture/framework is in place.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No common AI data architecture/framework is in place.", "location": "Pillar 5, p. 19"},
    {"id": "m-security-privacy", "text": "AT question for Security and Privacy — Level 1: No AI-specific privacy and data security rights, approaches, and standards are in place.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No AI-specific privacy and data security rights, approaches, and standards are in place for individual security, control, safety, and specificity in exchange for digital information.", "location": "Pillar 5, p. 20"},
    {"id": "m-data-governance", "text": "AT question for AI Data Governance — Level 1: No AI data governance process or entity is in place.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No AI data governance process or entity is in place.", "location": "Pillar 5, p. 21"},

    {"id": "m-usage-adoption", "text": "AT question for Usage and Adoption — Level 1: No AI business use cases are identified or documented.", "response_type": "ordinal maturity scale (Level 1–5, single answer)", "grounding_span": "No AI business use cases are identified or documented.     {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-adoption", "grounding_span": "AI Adoption Pursuit by organizations and/or individuals to commit to investing in, employing, and deriving continued value from AI capabilities.", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-data-governance", "grounding_span": "AI Data Governance Dedicated management of AI data performance and compliance to guard against data bias", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-due-diligence", "grounding_span": "AI Due Diligence Careful and persistent use of requisite AI and machine learning (ML) tools and resources", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-innovation", "grounding_span": "AI Innovation Process whereby research, systems engineering, human-machine design principles, and best practices integrate AI into transformational, cutting-edge business applications.", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-maturity-model", "grounding_span": "AI Maturity Model A methodology that is designed to advance AI adoption by organizations.", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-platforms", "grounding_span": "AI Platforms Defined set of hardware, software, networking tools, and services designed to support the development, adoption, use, and management of AI across an organization.", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-strategic-partnerships", "grounding_span": "AI Strategic Partnerships Documented relationships between government, private enterprises, academic institutions, and FFRDCs to effect collaboration", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai-strategic-plan", "grounding_span": "AI Strategic Plan A document used by leadership to communicate business goals, measures, implementa-tion approaches, timelines, and resources for AI initiatives.", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ai", "grounding_span": "Artificial Intelligence (AI) Pursuant to the DoD AI Strategy, AI is “the ability of machines to perform tasks that nor-mally require human intelligence.”", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-assessment-levels", "grounding_span": "Assessment Levels Defined levels of progress improvement (maturity) within AI adoption processes.", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ethical-ai", "grounding_span": "Ethical AI Ethical AI is a focus area that examines ways to ensure AI systems and their human op-erators adhere to well-defined ethical guidelines", "location": "Glossary, p. 34"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-equitable", "grounding_span": "Equitable An equitable solution is designed to provide fair and equal treatment across diverse popu-lations.", "location": "Glossary, p. 34"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-explainable", "grounding_span": "Explainable Explainable AI is the extent to which the mechanics and performance of an AI system can be explained in human terms and clearly understood.", "location": "Glossary, p. 34"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-governance", "grounding_span": "Governance Conduct of ensuring and overseeing performance and compliance of AI policies, ethics, accountability to responsible use, technical standards, and change management practices in a fair manner.", "location": "Glossary, p. 34"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-human-centric", "grounding_span": "Human-Centric A design approach for information technology systems that is characterized by humanistic values and observance of human welfare.", "location": "Glossary, p. 34"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-transparency", "grounding_span": "Transparency Quality of AI that allows for ease of explanation and understanding.", "location": "Glossary, p. 35"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-trustworthiness", "grounding_span": "Trustworthiness Ability of an AI solution to produce human confidence throughout its performance", "location": "Glossary, p. 35"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-culture", "grounding_span": "Culture An organization’s customs, practices, shared conventions, values, and artifacts that sup-port and enable AI adoption.", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-dimensions", "grounding_span": "Dimensions Functional and measurable features that are foundational to successful AI adoption", "location": "Glossary, p. 34"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-pillars", "grounding_span": "Pillars Structured group of related functional areas (dimensions) that are important factors in successful AI adoption.", "location": "Glossary, p. 35"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-technology-enablers", "grounding_span": "Technology Enablers Tools and methodologies utilized by organizations to advance technology adoption and maturity", "location": "Glossary, p. 35"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-test-evaluation", "grounding_span": "Test & Evaluation Process by which AI systems or components are compared against requirements and spec-ifications through testing", "location": "Glossary, p. 35"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-ffrdc", "grounding_span": "Federally funded research and development centers (FFRDCs) are a special class of research centers", "location": "Glossary, p. 34"},
    {"type": "defines", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "def-bias-evaluation", "grounding_span": "Bias Evaluation Standards and Guidelines Measures designed to evaluate and mitigate general classes of bias and reduce risk", "location": "Glossary, p. 33"},

    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "claim-10-percent", "grounding_span": "only 10% of organizations are achieving significant financial benefits with AI [4]", "location": "Introduction, p. 1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "claim-6x", "grounding_span": "Those companies that draw on multiple types of interaction and feedback between humans and AI are six times more likely to amplify their success with AI.", "location": "Introduction, p. 1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "claim-foundational-19", "grounding_span": "Building foundational capabilities—AI infrastructure, talent, and strategy—increases the likelihood of achieving significant benefits by 19%.", "location": "Introduction, p. 1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "mitre-ai-maturity-model", "to_id": "claim-scaling-18", "grounding_span": "Scaling AI across different use cases and going beyond automation increases the likelihood by another 18%.", "location": "Introduction, p. 1"},
